category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Laos) compliance gap comparison.

target_market_label.zh: 老挝（DOSM / 能源矿产部 / EDL）
target_market_label.zht: 寮國（DOSM / 能源礦產部 / EDL）

title.en: China-to-Laos Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入老挝：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入寮國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Laos requirements: DOSM conformity for regulated goods, IEC/ASEAN battery safety basis, MPT wireless approval where applicable, MEM/EDL energy context, land transit via Thailand or Vietnam, and UN 38.3 transport.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与老挝要求对照：受管制商品的DOSM合格评定、IEC/ASEAN电池安全基础、适用时的MPT无线审批、能源矿产部/老挝电力公司能源背景、经泰国或越南陆路中转，以及UN 38.3运输要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與寮國要求對照：受管制商品的DOSM合格評定、IEC/ASEAN電池安全基礎、適用時的MPT無線審批、能源礦產部/寮國電力公司能源背景、經泰國或越南陸路中轉，以及UN 38.3運輸要求。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors, Laos import partners, DOSM, MEM, EDL, MPT, customs, and carriers before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问、老挝进口伙伴、DOSM、能源矿产部、老挝电力公司、MPT、海关及承运人核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問、寮國進口夥伴、DOSM、能源礦產部、寮國電力公司、MPT、海關及承運人核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese GB 31241 or CCC evidence is only a starting point for Laos. Exporters should confirm whether the exact lithium battery, power bank, charger, or wireless-enabled product is inside DOSM regulated-goods scope, prepare IEC 62133/ASEAN-adopted safety evidence, use MPT approval for wireless functions where applicable, and retain UN 38.3 transport documentation for landlocked transit via Thailand or Vietnam.
answer_first.zh: 中国GB 31241或CCC证据只能作为进入老挝的起点。出口商应确认具体锂电池、移动电源、充电器或带无线功能产品是否落入DOSM受管制商品范围，准备IEC 62133/ASEAN采标安全证据，适用时办理MPT无线审批，并为经泰国或越南中转的内陆运输保留UN 38.3运输文件。
answer_first.zht: 中國GB 31241或CCC證據只能作為進入寮國的起點。出口商應確認具體鋰電池、行動電源、充電器或帶無線功能產品是否落入DOSM受管制商品範圍，準備IEC 62133/ASEAN採標安全證據，適用時辦理MPT無線審批，並為經泰國或越南中轉的內陸運輸保留UN 38.3運輸文件。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must preserve official-source URLs, publisher, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
